def select_action(obs: np.ndarray) -> int:
    """Select a Pong action from the 128-byte RAM state.

    The player controls the right paddle. A point is scored each time
    the ball passes the opponent's paddle; a point is lost when the
    ball passes the player's own paddle.

    Args:
        obs: 128-element uint8 array (ALE RAM).
            obs[49]: ball x  (17-160, left to right)
            obs[54]: ball y  (17-194, larger = lower on screen)
            obs[51]: player (right) paddle y center (34-194)
            obs[50]: CPU (left) paddle y center     (34-194)
    Returns:
        action: 0 (NOOP), 2 (UP), or 3 (DOWN)
    """
    ball_y = obs[54]
    paddle_y = obs[51]
    ball_x = obs[49]
    
    # Estimate ball vertical velocity from position relative to paddle
    # Higher x means ball is closer to the right paddle
    # Use a prediction: if ball is moving toward paddle, anticipate its y
    if ball_x > 120:  # ball is close to the right side
        # Predict ball will continue moving vertically; add a small offset
        predicted_y = ball_y
    else:
        # Ball far away: use simple tracking with a dead zone
        predicted_y = ball_y
    
    error = predicted_y - paddle_y
    if error < -8:
        return 2  # UP
    elif error > 8:
        return 3  # DOWN
    return 0  # NOOP

def select_action(obs: np.ndarray) -> int:
    """Select a Pong action from the 128-byte RAM state.

    The player controls the right paddle. A point is scored each time
    the ball passes the opponent's paddle; a point is lost when the
    ball passes the player's own paddle.

    Args:
        obs: 128-element uint8 array (ALE RAM).
            obs[49]: ball x  (17-160, left to right)
            obs[54]: ball y  (17-194, larger = lower on screen)
            obs[51]: player (right) paddle y center (34-194)
            obs[50]: CPU (left) paddle y center     (34-194)
    Returns:
        action: 0 (NOOP), 2 (UP), or 3 (DOWN)
    """
    ball_y = obs[54]
    paddle_y = obs[51]
    ball_x = obs[49]
    
    if not hasattr(select_action, 'prev_ball_y'):
        select_action.prev_ball_y = ball_y
        select_action.prev_ball_x = ball_x
    
    dy = ball_y - select_action.prev_ball_y
    dx = ball_x - select_action.prev_ball_x
    
    select_action.prev_ball_y = ball_y
    select_action.prev_ball_x = ball_x
    
    # Time to reach paddle x (160) assuming current horizontal speed
    dist_to_paddle = 160 - ball_x
    if dx > 0:
        time_to_hit = dist_to_paddle / dx
    else:
        time_to_hit = 10.0  # ball moving away or slow, use a default
    
    # Predict ball y at interception time
    predicted_y = ball_y + dy * time_to_hit
    predicted_y = max(34, min(194, predicted_y))
    
    # Hysteresis band that shrinks as ball gets closer
    hyst = max(4, 20 - dist_to_paddle // 8)
    
    if predicted_y < paddle_y - hyst:
        return 2
    elif predicted_y > paddle_y + hyst:
        return 3
    return 0

    """Select a Pong action from the 128-byte RAM state.

    ball passes the player's own paddle.

    Args:

            obs[50]: CPU (left) paddle y center     (34-194)
    Returns:
        action: 0 (NOOP), 2 (UP), or 3 (DOWN)
    """

    paddle_y = obs[51]

    if not hasattr(select_action, 'hysteresis_count'):
        select_action.hysteresis_count = 0
        select_action.last_action = 0

def select_action(obs: np.ndarray) -> int:
    """Select a Pong action from the 128-byte RAM state.

    The player controls the right paddle. A point is scored each time
    the ball passes the opponent's paddle; a point is lost when the
    ball passes the player's own paddle.

    Args:
        obs: 128-element uint8 array (ALE RAM).
            obs[49]: ball x  (17-160, left to right)
            obs[54]: ball y  (17-194, larger = lower on screen)
            obs[51]: player (right) paddle y center (34-194)
            obs[50]: CPU (left) paddle y center     (34-194)
    Returns:
        action: 0 (NOOP), 2 (UP), or 3 (DOWN)
    """
    ball_y = obs[54]
    paddle_y = obs[51]
    if not hasattr(select_action, 'prev_error'):
        select_action.prev_error = 0

    error = ball_y - paddle_y
    # Use a proportional factor and hysteresis
    if abs(error) > 8 or abs(error) > 4 and abs(error - select_action.prev_error) > 2:
        if error < 0:
            select_action.prev_error = error
            return 2  # UP
        else:
            select_action.prev_error = error
            return 3  # DOWN
    select_action.prev_error = error
    return 0  # NOOP
